session.user:
Run these commands sequentially and report all results:
1. ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/land_stack.py tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_stack.py 2. ty check src/erk/cli/commands/land_stack.py 3. pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_stack.py -v --tb=short
Report a summary of each.
session.assistant: I'll run these commands sequentially and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check ruff linting on land_stack.py files

session.assistant: Good! Now let's run the type checker:

tool_use.param: Run pytest on land_stack test file
